name: henry-hub
description: Henry's personal plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: ssot-prompt-engineer
plugins.description: SSOT 规则提取器：从成品文档反向提取生成规则，输出标准化 Skill Blueprint 供 skill-creator 消费

plugins.name: purvar-prd
plugins.description: 璞华PRD工作流：生成PRD、需求确认单、澄清PRD

plugins.name: ai-pm-feedback-collector
plugins.description: PM碎片信息收集与洞察整理工具

plugins.name: meeting-prep
plugins.description: 会议准备工具，6 问生成会前文档

plugins.name: weekly-report
plugins.description: 周报生成工具，从聊天记录自动生成会议周报

plugins.name: bid-generator
plugins.description: 投资管理领域标书生成工具

plugins.name: purvar-hld
plugins.description: 璞华概要设计说明书：组装概设 + Word转换

plugins.name: req-to-issues
plugins.description: 需求分析拆解工具：将需求素材分析拆解为 GitHub/GitLab Issue 并批量上传

plugins.name: business-flow-diagram
plugins.description: 从代码或需求文档生成Excalidraw业务流程全景图，自动发现逻辑断点

plugins.name: svg-diagram
plugins.description: SVG图表生成器：流程图、架构图、系统拓扑图、时序图，支持中文
